caption: Here's the snake game, with a soft pastel look - mint greens, warm peach, and rounded corners for that cute minimalist feel.
Let's click Start Game and bring the snake to life.
Steering with the arrow keys - watch the snake glide across the board hunting for the peach colored apple.
Full four-directional control - and the game smartly blocks impossible one-eighty turns.
Every apple eaten grows the snake longer and adds ten points to the score up top.
Need a break? One click pauses everything exactly where it is.
And resume continues right from the same spot.
Reset starts a fresh run - but your high score stays saved in the browser, even after closing the page.
Clean code, four small files, no dependencies - just open index dot html and play.
